data.title: Litecoin could surge to $125-130 in 2 weeks if $120 resistance is breached, with 10-15% potential upside.
data.description: Analysts predict that if the resistance level at $120 is breached, the price of LTC could reach between $125 and $130. Technical indicators suggest a neutral momentum, indicating a potential increase of 10-15% from the current levels.

data.title: ATOM price aiming for $5.20 by Sept 2025 with bullish momentum signaled by technical indicators. Analysts remain cautiously optimistic despite recent -2.10% dip.
data.description: Analysts are cautiously optimistic about the Cosmos (ATOM) forecast, predicting a price target of $5.20 within the next 4 weeks. This comes as the MACD indicator shows bullish divergence despite a recent decrease of 2.10% in the price. It is expected that the price will rebound in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: UNI price expected to consolidate near $10.20-$11.50 before aiming for $12.20 in 30 days despite mixed signals.
data.description: The forecast for UNI price indicates a period of stability between $10.20 and $11.50 before a potential rise to $12.20 in a bullish breakout. Technical analysis reveals conflicting signals regarding the future movement of the price.

data.title: JoggAI and ElevenLabs launch AvatarX, a multilingual AI avatar model, enhancing global video creation. Learn more.
data.description: In a collaboration between JoggAI and ElevenLabs, AvatarX, a multilingual AI avatar model, has been launched to revolutionize global video creation. This innovative technology aims to enhance videos with expressive and emotion-rich avatars, catering to a diverse audience across languages.

data.title: ElevenLabs boosts RAG System for 50% quicker response time, enhancing AI conversational agents' performance.
data.description: A recent development by ElevenLabs has resulted in an upgrade to its Retrieval-Augmented Generation system. This advancement has led to a notable 50% decrease in response time, marking a substantial enhancement in the performance of AI conversational agents.

data.title: Learn about ElevenLabs' comprehensive framework for AI voice agents, emphasizing safety with ethical compliance and risk mitigation strategies.
data.description: Discover the safety guidelines for AI voice agents, emphasizing ethical conduct, adherence to regulations, and minimizing risks, as outlined by ElevenLabs. Learn more about this comprehensive framework to ensure the responsible deployment of AI technology for voice agents.

data.title: Chainlink aims for $30.94 if it overcomes $26.50 resistance, with forecast targeting Fibonacci levels in 2-4 weeks.
data.description: The current price prediction for LINK suggests a possible surge to $30.94 if buyers manage to maintain levels above the $26.50 resistance mark. Chainlink's forecast indicates a focus on crucial Fibonacci levels in the upcoming 2-4 weeks, emphasizing a potential breakout scenario.

data.title: AVAX projected to reach $32 in 30 days due to technical breakout, with Avalanche forecast showing 25% upside.
data.description: According to a price prediction, the value of AVAX is anticipated to experience a bullish trend, aiming to reach $32 by September 2025. The current technical analysis indicates a potential increase of 25% for Avalanche, supporting this forecast.

data.title: Expect Polkadot to hit $4.67 resistance in September 2025 rally, with bullish MACD momentum at $4.11. Technical indicators show upward trend.
data.description: The current price of Polkadot (DOT) is $4.11, displaying a positive momentum indicated by the MACD indicator. Analysts predict a potential rise to $4.67, a resistance level expected to be reached within the next 3 to 4 weeks. Technical indicators point towards an upward movement in the near future for Polkadot.

data.title: Price of MATIC expected to reach $0.45-$0.50 within 7-14 days, presenting an 18-32% increase from current $0.35 support level.
data.description: The MATIC price forecast indicates a possible increase of 18-32%, reaching a range of $0.45-$0.50, as Polygon examines crucial support at $0.35 while experiencing oversold RSI conditions that could lead to a bullish turnaround.

data.title: Dogecoin aims for $0.27 in 2 weeks with 15-25% gains. MACD bullish, support at $0.23, breakout above $0.26 resistance expected.
data.description: Dogecoin is aiming for a target of $0.27, as the MACD indicator shows a bullish trend and analysts predict a potential increase of 15-25%. The current support level is at $0.23, indicating a possible breakout above the resistance level of $0.26.

data.title: SOL's price forecast suggests $230-250 targets in 2 weeks, with resistance at $212 and strong support at $190.
data.description: Analysts are forecasting a price target of $230-250 for SOL in the next two weeks based on bullish alignment of technical indicators. Immediate resistance is expected at $212, while robust support remains at $190.

data.title: Cardano eyes $1.18 target as triangle breakout looms, with key resistance at $0.97. Potential rally projected.
data.description: According to ADA price prediction, there is a possibility of a rally to $1.18 in the medium term as Cardano is currently consolidating within a symmetrical triangle pattern. The key resistance level for ADA stands at $0.97. This indicates a potential upward movement in the price of ADA cryptocurrency.

data.title: XRP price predicted to hit $3.40-$3.48 in 30 days despite short-term consolidation around $3.00 support.
data.description: Recent XRP price forecasts indicate potential targets of $3.40 to $3.48 within the next month. However, a period of consolidation near the $3.00 support level might occur before the anticipated upward movement.

data.title: Xai, an Ethereum gaming network, files lawsuit against Musk's xAI for trademark infringement, alleging confusion and harm.
data.description: The Ethereum gaming network Xai has alleged that xAI, Elon Musk's AI firm, has caused confusion in the market and harmed its reputation. The accusation revolves around claims that xAI's actions have led to negative repercussions on Xai's standing within the industry.

data.title: Ethereum set to hit $5,400 in 30 days - near 52-week highs with bullish MACD and RSI at 64.84 signaling technical momentum.
data.description: Ethereum is currently trading close to its highest value in the past 52 weeks, showing significant technical strength that suggests a potential target of $5,400. This is further backed by bullish positioning of the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) and Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 64.84.

data.title: Bitcoin may rise to $125,000 in a month as per analysis, facing resistance at $124,474 and supported at $111,685.
data.description: According to a technical analysis of Bitcoin, forecasts indicate that the price of BTC could reach $125,000 within the upcoming month. The immediate resistance level is anticipated to be around $124,474, while a significant support level is expected to hold firm at $111,685.

data.title: Rockit launches new Family Pack in Middle East amid strong demand for sharing occasions - Dubai, UAE, Aug. 24, 2025.
data.description: In a recent development in Dubai, UAE on August 24, 2025, Rockit, a leading snack sized apple brand from New Zealand, has expanded its product line by introducing a new Family Pack in the Middle East region. This move comes in response to the growing demand from consumers for convenient and shareable apple options for daily consumption. The Family Pack is aimed at catering to the preferences of customers looking for a larger quantity of Rockit's miniature apples, making it an ideal choice for various sharing occasions. This launch reflects Rockit's commitment to meeting the needs of its consumers and further establishing its presence in the Middle Eastern market.

data.title: Ethereum's August surge could prompt a September decline as historical data from 2016 indicates.
data.description: According to data from 2016 onwards, there is a trend that whenever the price of Ether has experienced an increase in August, it has consistently declined in the following month of September. This pattern has been observed over the past several years, indicating a potential correlation between the two months in Ether's price movements.

data.title: Sanctions on Russia haven't halted the war as expected. Business goes on despite previous fears of sanctions.
data.description: In recent years, the apprehension surrounding companies potentially incurring U.S. sanctions has diminished after decades of trepidation. The ease in concerns stems from a shifting landscape where adherence to sanctions may not always be as imperative as it once was. This change indicates a significant alteration in the way businesses perceive and navigate U.S. sanction guidelines, signifying a departure from historical anxieties.
